title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
